name: Online Summer Internship Program 2026
description: PHN Technology's Project Build Training Program enables students to solve real-world problem statements by building complete industry-level projects. A structured 30-day online journey from fundamentals to a final industry-level project — fully remote with live sessions.
schedule: Week 1: 4 days/week, 3 hours/day | Weeks 2–4: 4 days/week, 4 hours/day
how_it_works: Week 1 (3 hrs/day): Deep dive into your chosen domain with live sessions, tools setup, and project problem statement.
Weeks 2–4 (4 days/week, 4 hrs/day): Design, build, test, and iterate on your complete solution with mentor check-ins.
Weekly feedback sessions with domain experts — sharpen your solution, fix gaps, and elevate your final output.
Final week: Present your project, receive your certificate, and for selected students — begin research paper or patent guidance.

domains.name: AI/ML — Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
domains.description: Build intelligent systems, train ML models, and apply AI to real-world problem statements across computer vision, NLP and Predictive Analysis.

domains.name: EV & MatLab — Electric Vehicles and MatLab Simulation
domains.description: Simulate EV Systems, powertrain models and control algorithms using MATLAB/Simulink — preparing you for India's fast-growing EV industry.

domains.name: UI/UX — UX/UI Product Design
domains.description: Design user-centric digital products with real design thinking methodology — wireframes, prototypes, and a portfolio-ready case study from scratch.

domains.name: Business Analytics & Data Intelligence
domains.description: Turn raw data into business decisions using Excel, SQL, Python, and Power BI — building dashboards and analytical reports that drive real outcomes.

highlights: Work on real-world problem statements and build solutions aligned with industry use cases
Develop projects that you can showcase in your resume, GitHub, and interviews with confidence
Continuous guidance from domain experts with support for research papers and patent exploration (selected students)
Focus on execution, not theory — learn by building and solving real challenges
Six industry-ready capabilities developed throughout the program
Fully remote — attend from anywhere in India
certificate: PHN Technology Internship Completion Certificate (research paper/patent guidance for selected students)

name: Offline Summer Internship Program 2026 (IIT/NIT Campus)
description: Get real IIT/NIT campus experience, build industry-level projects, and earn a certificate that actually gets you hired — all in 30 days. A unique hybrid program starting with 1 week online and then 3 weeks of hands-on training at a premier IIT/NIT campus.
schedule: Week 1 (Online): 4 days/week, 3 hours/day | Weeks 2–4 (Offline): 4 days/week, 4 hours/day
how_it_works: Week 1 (Online, 3 hrs/day): Domain theory, problem statement introduction, tools & environment setup — all remote.
Weeks 2–4 (On-Campus, 4 days/week, 4 hrs/day): Hands-on lab sessions at your chosen IIT/NIT campus with expert mentors.
Design, build, test, and optimize your own industry-level solution from scratch. Your idea, your execution.
Receive IIT/NIT-affiliated industry certificate in collaboration with PHN, and for selected students — unlock research, paper, or patent guidance.
highlights: Real IIT/NIT campus experience — train inside world-class Centres of Excellence
Work on real Industry 4.0 problem statements and build fully functional systems from scratch
Develop 3 complete, working systems that strengthen your resume, portfolio, and interview profile
Innovative project outcomes receive structured guidance for research publication and patent exploration (selected students)
Learn under IIT/NIT mentors and domain experts with structured evaluation
Work across mechanical, electronics, and AI domains — just like real-world engineering teams
certificate: IIT/NIT-affiliated Industry Certificate in collaboration with PHN Technology (co-branded). Research paper or patent guidance for selected students.
